title: Workstate snapshot (v3)
description: The single versioned artifact Workstate compiles and RexOps consumes as its source of truth. Envelope { schema_version, built_at } wrapping three Section<T> objects (scripts, tools, findings). Modeled from workstate/src/model/snapshot.rs plus the normalized inventory types, cross-checked against the live RexOps fixture. Workstate is strictly read-only and never mutates source tools.
$comment: SEAMS (intentional, documented): (1) tools[].review_due is date-or-null but the LIVE signal is review_due_flag — RexOps currently parses review_due as a bool and ignores any date. (2) tools.tool_count / attention_count are producer-reported summaries, advisory only, not cross-checked against tools[].length. (3) Record objects allow additionalProperties because producers preserve unmodeled upstream keys: Script flattens them inline (serde flatten); Finding may emit a nested 'rest' object that is OMITTED entirely when empty (skip_serializing_if). (4) section.data is null when a section is Missing/Failed/UnsupportedVersion — graceful degradation, not an error. Obsolete v1 fields (source_tool, projects[], top-level generated_at) are intentionally absent; additionalProperties:true at the root means a stray legacy key degrades rather than hard-failing, matching consumer leniency.

schema_version.description: Major contract version. RexOps gates on this FIRST; only v3 is consumed.

built_at.description: When this snapshot was compiled (RFC3339 UTC). Replaces the obsolete v1 'generated_at'.

fetched_at.description: When Workstate READ the feed (UTC); null if never fetched (Missing).

source_observed_at.description: When the SOURCE tool generated the data (UTC); null if unknown. The real staleness signal.

status.description: Workstate's freshness verdict. A known string, any other string (forward-compat: degrades to Unknown health on the consumer), or a tagged object for the two data-bearing variants. Intentionally NOT a closed enum.

data.description: ScriptInventory, or null when the section is Missing/Failed/UnsupportedVersion.

items.$comment: additionalProperties:true — Script flattens unmodeled ScriptVault keys inline (serde flatten).

tool_count.description: Advisory: producer-reported, not cross-checked against tools[].length.

review_due.description: SEAM: date-or-null. LIVE signal is review_due_flag; RexOps currently reads this as a bool and ignores any date.

review_due_flag.description: The live 'review is due' signal from ToolFoundry.

items.$comment: additionalProperties:true — Finding may carry a nested 'rest' object of unmodeled non-sensitive keys, OMITTED entirely when empty (skip_serializing_if), so it is never required.

severity.description: Normalized bucket info|low|medium|high|critical|unrated|unknown. String, not enum, so an unforeseen value degrades not fails.

location.description: Always present ('unknown' when the source gave none).
